nasb.text: for he powerfully refuted the Jews in public, demonstrating by the Scriptures that Jesus was the Christ.

esv.text: for he powerfully refuted the Jews in public, showing by the Scriptures that the Christ was Jesus.

cnv.text: 因為他當眾有力地駁倒猶太人，引用聖經證明耶穌是基督。

ccb.text: 他在公众面前有力地驳倒犹太人，引用圣经证明耶稣就是基督。

csbs.text: 因为他当众强有力地驳倒犹太人，用经文证明耶稣是基督。
